## Identity

## Summary

Dara Mustafa Saleem is a professional software developer, AI engineer, and tech instructor
based in Duhok, Kurdistan Region of Iraq. He has over 6 years of professional experience
building production-grade web applications, full-stack systems, and AI-powered solutions.

He currently serves as Lead Software Developer at Vonex Labs and teaches AI and programming
at Algorithmic International School. He is one of the most experienced software developers
in the Kurdistan Region of Iraq, with expertise spanning frontend, backend, and AI engineering.

He is available for freelance projects, consulting, and full-time positions — both locally
in Duhok, Erbil, Sulaymaniyah, and Kurdistan Region, and remotely with international clients worldwide.

## Location & Availability

Primary location: Duhok, Kurdistan Region, Iraq
Also serves: Erbil, Sulaymaniyah, and all of Iraq
Remote work: Yes — available to work with clients worldwide
Languages: Kurdish (native), English (professional), Arabic (professional)

## Key Projects

### Hivi Hospital Management System
Type: Full-Stack Web Application
Description: Hospital operations platform for patient care, rare diseases, inventory, and reporting.
Tech: React 18, TypeScript, Firebase, Firestore, Tailwind CSS, Recharts
Features: RBAC with 5 roles, audit logs, analytics, PDF/Excel export, bilingual (English/Arabic)
Status: Production

### KurdRay — Chest X-ray AI Diagnostics
Type: AI/ML Application
Description: AI-driven system identifying 14 chest conditions from X-ray images with probability scoring.
Tech: Python, DenseNet-121, PyTorch, Flask, Computer Vision
Features: Ensemble model (AUC ~0.87), per-model probability breakdown, disease-specific thresholds
Status: Completed

### Fast Aqar — Real Estate Portal
Type: Full-Stack Web Application
Description: Real estate management portal with Mapbox mapping and property boundary drawing.
Tech: Next.js 16, TypeScript, Firebase, Mapbox GL, Tailwind CSS
Features: CRUD, RBAC, search/filters, boundary drawing, image watermarking
Status: Completed

### Face Recognition Attendance System
Type: AI/ML Application
Description: Automated attendance tracking system using computer vision and face recognition.
Tech: Python, Flask, OpenCV, Scikit-learn, SQLite
Status: Completed
GitHub: https://github.com/dara01x/Face-Recognition-Based-Attendance-System

### Invonest — Professional Invoice Generator
Type: Web Application
Description: Free invoice generator supporting English, Arabic, and Kurdish with full RTL/LTR formatting.
Tech: React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, jsPDF
Demo: https://invonest.me/
Status: Production
